chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 332 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1624/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.1625/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.1626/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 27.01.2025 Ms. Saima Syed, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Petitioner has filed application for provisional release before the Collector of Customs Adjudication under Section 83(B) of the Customs Act, 1969 on 23.01.2025 and on the very next date, this petition has been filed seeking the same relief. No case is made out to entertain this petition if any subsequent adequate remedy having been availed. Petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
